statement.en: No-three-in-line problem (Green Open Problem 72): On an N×N integer grid, can one place more than 2N points such that no 3 are collinear? Equivalently, does AllowedSetSize(3, N) = 2N for all N ≥ 3? Verified for N ≤ 60. Grebennikov-Kwan 2025 proved no-k-in-line for k > 10^37.
statement.ja: No-three-in-line 問題 (Green 未解決問題 72): N×N 格子に、どの 3 点も同一直線上にないように 2N 点以上 (最大 2N 点) 配置できるか？ N ≤ 60 で計算機検証済. Grebennikov-Kwan 2025 が k > 10^37 の no-k-in-line を証明.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: ∀ N ≥ 3 の AllowedSetSize 等式. 計算機で N ≤ 60 検証済 (決着せず). GK2025 で k=10^37 以上は閉 → k=3 は open
reiTyping.rationale: 型=I_INFINITE_SEARCH_SPACE, 副=VI_BRIDGING (整数格子 × 実射影幾何 collinearity); 形式化=scaffold (実 sorry=7 in GreensOpenProblems/72.lean)

external: Grebennikov-Kwan 2025 arXiv:2510.17743: no-k-in-line for k > 10^37 proved

formalization.notes: Namespaces: Green72. 実 file 92 行: AllowedSet 構造体 + AllowedSetSize 定義 + allowedSetSize_le (pigeonhole 上界, 1 sorry) + NoKInLineFor + NoKInLine 一般 k (1 sorry) + green_72 (k=3 main, 1 sorry) + variants.eventually (1 sorry) + no_three_in_line_le N≤60 (1 sorry) + no_k_in_line_big k>10^37 GK2025 (1 sorry) + TODO lower bound = 7 sorry

known_progress.event: Erdős reposed the problem, showed ≥ 2N for N ≤ some threshold by pigeonhole
Computational verification for N ≤ 60: AllowedSetSize(3, N) = 2N verified

known_progress.impact: 高 k 領域 settled, k=3 は残 open

reiAssessment.approachSuggestion: (1) allowedSetSize_le (pigeonhole ≤ (k−1)N) は Finset.card + counting argument で tractable → Tier-1. (2) 小 N (3 ≤ N ≤ 10) は native_decide + Collinear 判定で閉鎖可. (3) no_three_in_line_le N ≤ 60 は既知計算結果の Lean 移植、大量だが mechanizable → Tier-2. (4) GK2025 は 2025 論文の本格移植 Tier-3. (5) green_72 k=3 全 N は真の open
reiAssessment.solveRationale: I_INFINITE_SEARCH_SPACE + VI_BRIDGING, NEITHER, scaffold (7 sorry). 計算的 side は tractable, 真の open (k=3 任意 N) は 108 年
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: pigeonhole と小 N 計算は Lean tractable. GK2025 全体移植は研究レベル
reiAssessment.famousHardCap: Dudeney 1917 以来 108 年 open (k=3 case)
